<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and why it is needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🌍 Translation added / updated
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore
- [ ] 📝 Docs only
- [ ] 🚀 CI / deployment

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally (format, lint, test, build)
- [ ] New / changed translations exist for **all** supported locales
- [ ] Source changed in `src/` only — never hand-edit `dist/` (it is generated)
- [ ] Banner text changes keep the message factual and scam-aware (Self-XSS)
- [ ] No secrets, PII or internal URLs committed

## Screenshots / Notes (optional)
